name: Baked Treacle and Ginger Sponge
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon ginger syrup taken from stem ginger jar
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease 4 pudding tins.
2. Mix together the melted golden syrup, lemon juice, breadcrumbs, and chopped ginger for the topping. Divide between the pudding tins.
3. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add the beaten eggs a little at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Fold in the dry ingredients to make a soft dropping consistency. If needed, add a few drops of cold water to achieve the right texture.
6. Divide the batter between the tins, hollowing out the center slightly.
7. Bake at 160°C/300°F for about 25 minutes until golden and well risen.
8. Put all sauce ingredients into a pan and bring to a boil. Simmer to amalgamate flavors and reduce slightly.
9. Turn out the puddings onto serving plates and pour the sauce over and around. Serve with vanilla custard.
